tracks.title: Cloud Nine
tracks.subgenre: Pop Hip Hop / Chill Hip Hop
tracks.mood: Feel Good, Uplifting, Bright, Summer, Carefree, Confident, Positive, Relaxed
tracks.shortDescription: Clean melodic hip hop with bright guitars, uplifting melodies, and feel-good summer energy.
tracks.description: A bright, melodic hip-hop instrumental featuring clean guitars, uplifting melodies, crisp drums, warm 808s, and polished production. Cloud Nine blends pop sensibilities with modern hip-hop energy, making it perfect for artists looking to create feel-good, memorable records.
tracks.productionNotes: Clean guitars, uplifting melodic layers, crisp drums, warm 808s, and polished pop hip hop structure keep the track bright, confident, and artist-ready.

tracks.title: Swagger
tracks.shortDescription: Cool, confident hip hop with an effortless late-night stride.
tracks.description: A polished, spacious hip hop record built around an unhurried pocket, restrained melodic movement, and low end that lands without crowding the artist.
tracks.productionNotes: The arrangement grows through small tonal shifts and percussion details, keeping the center open for a vocal while preserving momentum.

tracks.title: Heat Check
tracks.shortDescription: Dark, cinematic trap built for high-energy moments.
tracks.description: A dramatic trap production with tense orchestral color, commanding drums, and a structure designed for impact.
tracks.productionNotes: The main motif was kept deliberately direct, allowing the drum programming and evolving transitions to carry the intensity.

tracks.title: Hoodie
tracks.shortDescription: Smooth hip hop with an easy, reflective pocket.
tracks.description: A warm, artist-forward production that balances understated keys, conversational drums, and a relaxed melodic pocket.
tracks.productionNotes: Live keyboard phrasing gives the loop a human push and pull while the arrangement leaves generous room for storytelling.

tracks.title: Why Not
tracks.shortDescription: Spacious melodic trap with heavyweight low end.
tracks.description: An atmospheric trap record with wide melodic space, focused drums, and a low-end foundation built for modern vocals.
tracks.productionNotes: Negative space is part of the arrangement. Textures arrive only when they add emotional scale or clarify a transition.

tracks.title: TLKIN
tracks.shortDescription: Laid-back hip hop for after-hours writing sessions.
tracks.description: A conversational hip hop canvas shaped by dusty rhythm, gentle harmonic movement, and an after-hours atmosphere.
tracks.productionNotes: The groove stays slightly behind the beat, creating a comfortable pocket that supports dense verses and relaxed melodic ideas.

tracks.title: Backpack
tracks.shortDescription: Warm, dusty hip hop for city drives and quiet focus.
tracks.description: A textured lofi instrumental with worn-in harmony, soft drums, and enough movement to reward close listening.
tracks.productionNotes: The tonal character comes from layered keyboard performances and gentle degradation rather than a single static loop.
